# delegation-first

The standing **directive** of a boss–worker agent setup: *delegate
execution by default; keep the expensive boss for judgment and review.*
The posture layer — the *why* and the *always* — above the sibling
`delegation-rules` flow, which is the decidable *how*.

- [`spec/flows/delegation-first/DELEGATION-FIRST-PROTOCOL.md`](spec/flows/delegation-first/DELEGATION-FIRST-PROTOCOL.md)
  — the directive: the scarce-resource thesis, delegate-by-default, the
  capable-worker mandate, the never-delegate set, and the two
  obligations — review, and surfacing the delegation analysis out loud.
- [`spec/boot/76-flow-delegation-first.md`](spec/boot/76-flow-delegation-first.md)
  — the boot snippet a consuming boss loads at session start.

Fractality-opinionated by design: it lives in the `org.vibevm.fractality`
group so it may assume **fractality** as the agent spawner and name the
current worker slots (GLM-5.2 as `big`, glm-5-turbo as `small`). Its concern
is only **first-level** delegation — how fractality then distributes work
across sub-agents is fractality's own system, never prescribed here. A
project that prefers a different fabric substitutes it; the exact launcher
paths and live operational facts live in the consuming project's host
contract.
